simple.title: Simplify
simple.description: Return metadata with flattened headers. When off, fetches the full raw message (text/html and optional attachments).

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Gmail search filters (JSON). Strongly set filters.q (e.g. has:attachment, from:sender@example.com) so the trigger does not match all mail. Keys: q, readStatus (unread/read/both), labelIds, sender, includeSpamTrash, includeDrafts.

options.title: Options
options.description: When Simplify is off: downloadAttachments (bool), attachmentPrefix (default attachment_).

poll_times.title: Poll times
poll_times.description: Platform-managed poll schedule (minimum interval: every minute).
